creator: hendrik.lugtenburg@gmail.com
text:
Apparently some files are missing from the distfiles.

root@x4:/usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2 # make install MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes 
===>  Building for librsvg2-2.36.4
gmake  all-recursive
gmake[1]: Map '/usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2/work/librsvg-2.36.4' wordt binnengegaan
Making all in .
gmake[2]: Map '/usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2/work/librsvg-2.36.4' wordt binnengegaan
  GISCAN Rsvg-2.0.gir
In file included from /usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2/work/librsvg-2.36.4/rsvg.h:239,
                 from <stdin>:4:
/usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2/work/librsvg-2.36.4/rsvg-cairo.h:33:19: error: cairo.h: No such file or directory
Error while processing the source.
gmake[2]: *** [Rsvg-2.0.gir] Fout 1
gmake[2]: Map '/usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2/work/librsvg-2.36.4' wordt verlaten
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Fout 1
gmake[1]: Map '/usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2/work/librsvg-2.36.4' wordt verlaten
gmake: *** [all] Fout 2
*** [do-build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/librsvg2
make install
